system: fixed-end string truncated to the first three sine modes

state_variables.name: q1
state_variables.meaning: amplitude of first fixed-end sine mode

state_variables.name: q2
state_variables.meaning: amplitude of second fixed-end sine mode

state_variables.name: q3
state_variables.meaning: amplitude of third fixed-end sine mode

practical: point displacement pickup, optical displacement tracking, or microphone-like channel after an additional modal observer map is declared

regime_assumptions: fixed boundary conditions at x = 0 and x = L_string
orthonormal sine basis phi_n(x) = sqrt(2 / L_string) sin(n pi x / L_string)
modes above n = 3 are explicitly outside this finite object
damping, drive, nonlinear string motion, and point-sensor inversion are outside this card
equation_hook: U(q) = 1/2 sum_{n=1}^3 Tension (n pi / L_string)^2 q_n^2; M = mu I in the same orthonormal modal coordinates

units_and_dimensions.q_n: m sqrt(m) under the declared orthonormal spatial basis convention
units_and_dimensions.H: modal stiffness Hessian K; the mass metric M is a distinct declared object

coordinate_note: This finite modal card separates stiffness Hessian K, mass metric M, and frequency readout. The runner reads the declared stiffness Hessian K; frequencies require the pair (K, M) and are not inferred from K alone.

module_object.kind: finite modal stiffness Hessian with mass metric metadata
module_object.description: three-mode diagonal stiffness Hessian K plus a separate diagonal mass metric M for modal frequency interpretation

derivation_status: exact for the declared small-amplitude fixed-end string after basis choice and three-mode truncation

observer_map.description: observe the three declared modal amplitudes directly; practical point sensors require a separate observer map

ceiling_or_reference.description: no visible-block ceiling or hidden modal sector is declared in this card

positive_scope: This card converts a raw standing-wave formula into a finite positive modal stiffness object after boundary, basis, and truncation are declared.
boundary: It does not attach the infinite string, modes above n = 3, point-sensor inversion, damping, drive response, or hidden-load structure.
failure_mode: The attachment fails if the boundary conditions, modal basis, finite truncation, positive tension, or positive mass density are not declared.
next_measurement: Measure the first three resonant frequencies and use the declared M/K separation to test the modal convention before adding a point-sensor observer map.
